channel.title: Plays on nonlinear
channel.description: Recent content in Plays on nonlinear

item.title: ML5 testing
item.description: const bodypix = ml5.bodyPix(modelReady) function modelReady() { // segment the image given bodypix.segment(img, gotResults) } function gotImage(error, result) { if (error) { console.log(error); return; } // log the result console.log(result.maskBackground); }
